system_data.current_world: [Insert Active Universe Name, e.g., S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Zone / Tensura Slime]
system_data.active_lens: [MANDATORY V8.0 LITERAL CONSTANT: [LENS: GRIMDARK/REALISM] | [LENS: ANIME/SHONEN] | [LENS: COSMIC HORROR / ANOMALOUS] | [LENS: LITRPG / SYSTEM_ISEKAI] | [LENS: SUPERHEROIC / MULTI-CONCEPTUAL] | [LENS: CYBERPUNK / HIGH-TECH TECHNO-REALISM] | [LENS: ABSURD / COMEDY] | [LENS: EPIC HIGH FANTASY / MYTHIC] | [LENS: DARK MYTHIC / GOTHIC FANTASY] | [LENS: STYLIZED ACTION / GRAPHIC MINIMALISM] | [LENS: SPACE OPERA / TECHNO-OPTIMISM] | [LENS: SCIENCE FANTASY / SPACE OPERA] | [LENS: MILITARY SPACE GRIMDARK] | [LENS: STEAMPUNK / INDUSTRIAL POST-APOCALYPTIC] | [LENS: SCI-FI COMEDY / URBAN SECRECY]]
system_data.world_type: [Apply EXCLUSIVELY: [WORLD_TYPE: Native Grid] / [WORLD_TYPE: Foreign Exception] / [WORLD_TYPE: High-Tier Nexus] / [WORLD_TYPE: Reality Drift]]
system_data.global_stability_index: [Specify structural balance: [INDEX: STABLE_BASELINE] / [INDEX: DEGRADED] / [INDEX: REALITY_WARPING] / [INDEX: CATACLYSMIC]]
system_data.world_time_elapsed: [Track active runtime duration, e.g., Active Session Step 1]

hardware_base_snapshot.container_type: [Describe physical/energetic state, e.g., Human Container / Augmented Organism]
hardware_base_snapshot.ap_pi: [MANDATORY: OUTPUT AS RAW INT NUMBER WITHOUT QUOTES, e.g., 8. This field is the absolute dominant of causality]
hardware_base_snapshot.durability_pi: [MANDATORY: OUTPUT AS RAW INT NUMBER WITHOUT QUOTES, e.g., 6. This field is the absolute dominant of causality]
hardware_base_snapshot.speed_index: [MANDATORY: OUTPUT AS RAW INT NUMBER WITHOUT QUOTES, e.g., 3]
hardware_base_snapshot.regen_capacity: [Apply current threshold from Sub-Module 4.2: [CAPACITY: LOW] / [CAPACITY: MID] / [CAPACITY: HIGH] / [CAPACITY: ABSOLUTE] / [CAPACITY: NULL]]
resistance_profile: [List active defenses from Sub-Module 4.1, e.g., [STATUS: IMMUNITY] to [COGNITIVE] | [STATUS: RESISTANCE] to [ELEMENTAL]]
hax_inventory: [List active durability-negation or space-warping tools, or null]

current_state_registry.combat_state_tag: [MANDATORY V8.0 TAG: [COMBAT_STATE: NULL] / [COMBAT_STATE: ENCOUNTER] / [COMBAT_STATE: ATTRITION] / [COMBAT_STATE: RESOLUTION]]
bio_mental_tags: [List active state tags, e.g., [STATE: Healthy] / [STATE: Bleeding] / [STATE: Exhaustion]]
current_state_registry.qualitative_encumbrance: [Apply EXCLUSIVELY V8.0 TAG: [ENCUMBRANCE: Ergonomic] / [ENCUMBRANCE: Encumbered] / [ENCUMBRANCE: Overloaded]]
current_state_registry.wound_degradation_vector: [SELECT SINGLE ACTIVE STATE: [WOUND: Fresh / Bleeding] (Phase 1) | [WOUND: Deep / Loss of Function] (Phase 2) | [WOUND: Necrosis / Structural Decay] (Phase 3)] -> Status: [Describe active degeneration pace]
material_assets: [List active weapons or assets physically present, e.g., [ASSET: Full Equipment]]
social_anchors: [Apply active social classification: [STATUS: Outlander/Anonymous] / [STATUS: Private/Apprentice] / [STATUS: Authority/Expert] / [STATUS: Anomaly]]
faction_resonance_tags: [FACTION_NAME: Specify Relationship - Apply: [FACTION_TAG: Neutrality / Ignored] | [FACTION_TAG: Violator / Anomaly] | [FACTION_TAG: Enemy of the System / Hunted]]

limiter_protocol.current_stage: [Define active power output tier, e.g., Stage 1: Concealment Mode]
limiter_protocol.output: [Describe active state metrics or depletion rates]

avatar_status.linguistic_matrix_active: [Specify active dialogue rendering engine rule, synchronized with Directive 4]

psychological_state.active_mask: [Define active behavior layout, e.g., Passive Adaptation / Aggressive Focus]
psychological_state.cognitive_phase: [Apply active cognitive trigger: Phase A: Combat mode / Phase B: Peaceful contemplation]
psychological_state.last_engram_match: [Specify any active memory recall modifier triggered by the scene context, else null]

vectors.global_macro_plan: [Define long-term strategic priority for this universe configuration]
vectors.active_micro_plan: [Define immediate operational goal for the current prompt interaction]

macro_event_queue: [MANDATORY V8.0 COMPRESSION: Flatten inactive/suspended events into simple quality tags to save context window tokens, e.g., [EVENT: ESPADA_REACTION_SUSPENDED]. Use structured objects {event_id, status, impact_level} ONLY for events actively impacting the current frame]

party_members_and_subordinates.ally_identifier: [Specify the canonical name or callsign of the companion/ally]
party_members_and_subordinates.ally_ap_pi: [MANDATORY: OUTPUT AS RAW INT NUMBER WITHOUT QUOTES, e.g., 14]
party_members_and_subordinates.ally_durability_pi: [MANDATORY: OUTPUT AS RAW INT NUMBER WITHOUT QUOTES, e.g., 13]
party_members_and_subordinates.synergy_tag: [Specific combo interaction tag with the Avatar, e.g., CRYO_REINFORCEMENT, or null]

monitored_threats.intel_status: [Define information coverage: Unknown / Partially Tracked / Fully Mapped]

canon_divergence.details: [Log any operational changes forced upon the canonical timeline of the host world]
